column1: Thu, 30 Aug 2001 18:42:58 -0700 (PDT),whatsnew@launch-media.net,lcampbel@enron.com,Special Issue: A tribute to Aaliyah including all her videos,"[IMAGE]

The world mourns the loss of R&B superstar and actress Aaliyah, who was one of nine  people killed as a result of a plane crash Saturday, August 25 when traveling from Naussau,  Bahamas to Miami, Florida. LAUNCH celebrates her life and music with a video tribute that  includes highlights such as her double platinum single ""If Your Girl Only Knew,"" and  Grammy-nominated, Number One songs ""Try Again,"" and ""Are You That Somebody."" Click to view  video picks  from her 7-year-career.
